first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both give the same score (6/10) and base their reasoning on the same core issue: the candidate has strong, relevant experience in building developer tools but lacks recent, specific experience with the required Java/Kotlin/Spring tech stack. The minor differences in phrasing between the two versions are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any reaction to the added career gap.
